description: Resolve Git merge conflicts in the 'commons-inventory' project arising from a merge of 'main' into 'feature/discount-system'. For Product.java, ensure both the 'category' field and 'discountPercent' field are present and included in toString(). For InventoryManager.java, retain the Streams-based calculateTotalValue() and the calculateDiscountedTotal() method. For InventoryUtils.java, keep both the formatCurrency() and calculateBulkDiscount() methods. For pom.xml, include both commons-lang3 and commons-math3 dependencies. The final state must be a committed merge that compiles successfully using Maven.
